user_query: Show me Salesforce opportunities with an amount greater than 10,000. Include probability.

plan.query: Show me Salesforce opportunities with an amount greater than 10,000. Include probability.
plan.reasoning: The query requires fetching specific Salesforce opportunities based on a criteria (amount greater than 10,000) and including related probability information. One step can accomplish this by retrieving all required fields in a single query.

steps.task: Fetch all opportunities with an amount greater than 10,000 including their associated probability.

plan.synthesis: Present the list of opportunities retrieved in step 1, displaying both the amount and probability.

invoked_agents.input: Fetch all opportunities with an amount greater than 10,000 including their associated probability.
